home.empty: No recordings yet — import or record your first one.

dashboard.empty: No recordings yet — import or record your first one.
dashboard.recordedSaved: Recording saved and queued for processing
dashboard.dropRequiresElectron: Drag-and-drop is only available in the desktop app

queue.cancelConfirmRunning: This job is already running. Cancel anyway?

settings.title: Settings

fields.languageDesc: Language in which the app interface is displayed.
fields.themeDesc: Light, dark, or follow the system setting.
fields.llmEndpointDesc: URL of your local or remote LLM server (OpenAI-compatible API). Example: http://localhost:1234.
fields.llmModelDesc: The model used for cleaning up and enriching transcripts.
fields.whisperModelPathDesc: Path to a Whisper binary model file (.bin). Used for audio transcription.
fields.vadModelPathDesc: Path to the voice-activity detection model. Helps trim silence more accurately.
fields.whisperThreadsDesc: Number of CPU threads for transcription. 0 means automatic selection.
fields.dictationKeyboardHotkeyDesc: Global keyboard shortcut that starts dictation from any app.
fields.dictationPushToTalkDesc: While the hotkey is held, recording runs. Release to stop.
fields.dictationDumpEnabledDesc: Enables recording directly into _inbox/ via a separate hotkey, bypassing the processing queue.
fields.obsidianApiHostDesc: Host of the Local REST API plugin in Obsidian. Usually http://localhost:27123.
fields.syncthingEnabledDesc: Starts the Syncthing service to sync data across devices.
fields.vaultPathDesc: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault folder on disk.
fields.obsidianFeatureEnabledDesc: Enables note export and the Obsidian button in the UI.
fields.dictationEnabledDesc: Activates the global dictation mode via hotkey.
fields.dictationHotkeyTypeDesc: Mouse or keyboard — what triggers dictation.
fields.dictationMouseButtonDesc: Mouse button index: 1 = left, 2 = right, 3 = middle, 4 = back, 5 = forward.
fields.dictationLanguageDesc: Speech recognition language: ru / en / auto.
fields.dictationWhisperModelIdDesc: Name of the model used by the dictation service (e.g. whisper-small-ru).
fields.dictationCaptureSampleRateDesc: Microphone recording sample rate. Default 16000 Hz (Whisper standard).
fields.dictationLlmPolishDesc: Runs the recognised text through the LLM to fix typos and punctuation.
fields.dictationInjectModeDesc: How text is inserted into the active field: auto / accessibility / cgevent / clipboard.
fields.dictationOverlayEnabledDesc: Displays a status indicator while dictation is active.
fields.dictationOverlayPositionDesc: Where the overlay appears: at cursor, bottom-centre, or top-right.
fields.dictationSoundFeedbackDesc: Plays a sound when dictation starts and stops.
fields.dictationModelUnloadMinutesDesc: Minutes of inactivity before the Whisper model is unloaded. 0 = never.
fields.dictationTempAudioPathDesc: Path where temporary files are stored during dictation.
fields.dictationClassifyIntentEnabledDesc: Detects commands in dictated text (e.g. 'open notes').
fields.llmProviderDesc: LLM server protocol. Currently only OpenAI-compatible is supported.
fields.webCacheTtlHoursDesc: How long (in hours) web search results are cached.
fields.syncthingObsidianVaultPathDesc: Local path to the vault folder that Syncthing synchronises.
fields.syncthingApiKeyDesc: Authorisation key for the Syncthing GUI API.
fields.syncthingBaseUrlDesc: Base URL of the Syncthing web interface. Usually http://127.0.0.1:8384.
fields.mcpServerEnabledDesc: Starts the built-in MCP server for connecting external tools.
fields.mcpServerPortDesc: TCP port the MCP server listens on.
fields.mcpServerTokenDesc: Bearer token for authenticating connections to the MCP server.
fields.actionsSkillEnabledDesc: Enables the system actions skill via Claude CLI.
fields.remindersSkillEnabledDesc: Enables the reminders skill via Claude CLI.
fields.claudeCliPathDesc: Path to the claude executable. Leave blank for auto-discovery via PATH.

settings.hotkeyHint: Click the field and hold the combination you want. Requires an app restart to take effect (hot-reload is tracked as H1).
settings.dumpHotkeyToggleHint: Press — recording starts under the default profile. Press again — stop; the file goes through the pipeline and exports into _inbox/.
settings.dumpHotkeyHoldHint: Hold to record, release to stop. Same path: default profile → pipeline → _inbox/.
settings.tokenHint: Stored locally in SQLite. Never leaves your machine except to the configured endpoint.

llmModels.label: Available models
llmModels.empty: LLM endpoint unreachable. Configure or start your LLM server.

validation.invalidUrl: Must start with http:// or https://

sidecarEnrichment.label: Enable sidecar enrichment (experimental)
sidecarEnrichment.description: After transcription, runs diarisation, gender, emotion, NER, cleanup, and embedding via the python sidecar. Default off.

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.empty: Runtime state unavailable. Click Re-probe to fetch.

pairing.title: Pair a device
pairing.subtitle: Scan this QR code from the Syncthing mobile app to pair your phone.

status.title: Sync status
status.subtitle: Live view of folders and devices reported by Syncthing.

pending.title: Pending pairing requests
pending.subtitle: Syncthing sees a new device — accept to start syncing.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Download what you need — everything stays local.

obsidian.title: Obsidian vault
obsidian.setupHint: Wire up Obsidian — vault, plugins, templates.

emptyState.obsidian-feature-disabled: Obsidian integration is disabled in Settings
emptyState.vaultHint: Point Mozgoslav at your Obsidian vault to start.

wizard.title: Setup wizard
wizard.subtitle: Five steps — detect the vault, install plugins, sync templates.
wizard.hint: Diagnostics validate each step. If something fails, hit Run again.

diagnostics.title: Integration diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: At-a-glance view of what's connected, missing, or drifted.
diagnostics.reapplyBootstrapSuccess: Templates and scripts restored from the shipped version.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Mozgoslav
onboarding.subtitle: Quick setup so your first call works out of the box.

welcome.title: Hello!
welcome.hint: Let's get you set up. Starter models are already bundled.

tryItNow.title: Ready to go
tryItNow.hint: Whisper Small RU, Silero VAD, and Natasha NER ship in the app. Upgrade anytime in Settings → Models.

models.title: Models
models.hint: Download the bundled models — they are required for the app to work.

llm.title: LLM (optional)
llm.hint: LLM polishes your notes. Install LM Studio or Ollama — or skip and configure later.

obsidian.title: Obsidian (optional)
obsidian.hint: If you have a vault we'll pick it and prepare folders. Otherwise skip.

mic.title: Microphone access
mic.hint: Needed for recording + dictation. You can skip — macOS prompts on the first click.

dictation.title: Dictation permissions
dictation.hint: Accessibility + Input Monitoring gate the global hotkey + text injection. Skippable.

ready.title: Ready
ready.hint: Hit Apply to start using Mozgoslav. Skipped steps are always available in Settings.

onboarding.llmReachable: LLM is reachable — ready to polish notes.
onboarding.llmUnreachable: No LLM detected — skip or connect later.
onboarding.modelsReady: Models are installed — you can continue.
onboarding.modelsMissing: Download or point to a Whisper/VAD model to continue.
onboarding.obsidian.notDetected: Vault not found — skip for now.

backup.title: Backups
backup.empty: No backups yet. One click and you're covered.

batch.hintPlaceholder: e.g. Q2 planning call, Ivan and Olga

webSearch.privacyDisclaimer: Web search runs through SearXNG — a local aggregator that does not share data with third parties.

systemActions.title: System Actions
systemActions.subtitle: Import default Apple Shortcuts to enable voice-controlled reminders, calendar events, and file operations.

cronSlot.title: Cron Routine (coming soon)
cronSlot.description: Scheduled tasks on a recurring schedule — next version.
